nodes.title: Take Break Damage
nodes.description: Given a character with a break gauge, when TakeBreakDamage(amount) is called, then CurrentBreakGauge decreases by amount (floored at 0) and OnBreakGaugeChanged fires with (current, max).

nodes.title: Break Triggers At Zero
nodes.description: Given CurrentBreakGauge reaches 0 via TakeBreakDamage, then BreakCharacter() is called: IsBroken=true, BrokenStunRemaining set to GameWorldConstants.BreakStunDurationSeconds, OnCharacterBroken fires.

nodes.title: Broken Stun Timer
nodes.description: Given a broken character (IsBroken=true, BrokenStunRemaining > 0), when Update runs, then BrokenStunRemaining decreases by deltaTime. When it reaches <= 0, RecoverFromBreak() is called.

nodes.title: Recover From Break
nodes.description: Given RecoverFromBreak() is called, then IsBroken=false, BrokenStunRemaining=0, CurrentBreakGauge resets to MaxBreakGauge, and OnBreakGaugeChanged fires.

nodes.title: Already Broken Ignores
nodes.description: Given a character that is already IsBroken, when TakeBreakDamage() is called, then it returns immediately with no change to break gauge.

nodes.title: On Character Broken Event
nodes.description: Given a character's break gauge reaches 0, when BreakCharacter() executes, then OnCharacterBroken event fires with the broken character as parameter.
